## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` is clean
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] `dart format .` applied
- [ ] New user-facing strings added to **all** ARB locales (`en`/`de`/`es`/`ar`)
- [ ] No secrets committed (keys via `--dart-define`, tokens in `SecureStore`)
- [ ] New features follow the layering + `Result` conventions in `AGENTS.md`
